user.title: Connect to zencontrol controller
user.description: Enter the details for your zencontrol application controller. Note that the controller must have a TPI Advanced license attached.

data.label: Controller name
data.unicast: Use unicast events (not recommended - only use if broadcast packets are unsupported by your network topology)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure zencontrol controller
reconfigure.description: Update connection settings for your zencontrol application controller.

data.label: Controller name
data.unicast: Use unicast events (not recommended - only use if broadcast packets are unsupported by your network topology)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the controller. Check the host/port and try again.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.

abort.already_configured: This zencontrol application controller is already configured.
